scenarios.name: Granular API Routing
scenarios.details: /ingest/file and /ingest/url endpoints are correctly routed to the handler.

scenarios.name: Atomic Sync Logic
scenarios.details: Frontend correctly iterates over data sources and updates individual status (pending/success/error).

scenarios.name: UI Validation
scenarios.details: 'Add Data Source' button is disabled for empty inputs; 'Next' requires at least one source.

scenarios.name: Storage Connectivity
scenarios.details: Restored minio:9000 endpoint for reliable internal communication.
